title: MS / MD Jobs 2026 – Research Associate I
shortInfo: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhubaneswar Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 notification released for 1 post. Candidates can apply through email mode on or before 04 June 2026. The walk-in interview will be held on 06 June 2026 at the official AIIMS Bhubaneswar recruitment process.

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhubaneswar Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhubaneswar
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhubaneswar Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 notification released for 1 post. Candidates can apply through email mode on or before 04 June 2026. The walk-in interview will be held on 06 June 2026 at the official AIIMS Bhubaneswar recruitment process.

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Bhubaneswar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.details: PhD/MD/MS/MDS or equivalent degree or having 3 years of research, teaching, design and development experience after MVSc/M.Pharm/ME/M.Tech with at least one research paper in Science Citation Indexed (SCI) or PubMed Indexed journal.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Research Associate-I position at AIIMS Bhubaneswar?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate-I position is 04-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD/MD/MS/MDS or equivalent degree. Alternatively, 3 years of research, teaching, design, and development experience after MVSc/M.Pharm/ME/M.Tech with at least one SCI or PubMed indexed research paper is also accepted.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Research Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate-I position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: How will candidates be selected for the Research Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two stages: initial shortlisting of applications followed by a walk-in interview.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly salary ranges from Rs. 69,600/- in the first year to Rs. 80,400/- in the third year, including HRA.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for this job opening?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Where is AIIMS Bhubaneswar located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Bhubaneswar is located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha.

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate-I post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Research Associate-I position is scheduled to be held on 06-06-2026.
